content: Disabling {{organizationName}} AI will make {{organizationName}}-provided models unavailable.

comment.text: This key displays a confirmation message in a dialog or confirmation panel. It warns users that disabling AI tools will make the organization's AI models unavailable. The message includes the organization’s name, which should be localized appropriately.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Atspoguļot' means 'To reflect' or 'To mirror'. It is used incorrectly here instead of a term for 'Disabling'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Atslēdzot {{organizationName}} AI, {{organizationName}} nodrošinātie modeļi kļūs nepieejami.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender mismatch: 'IA' (Inteligência Artificial) is a feminine noun in Portuguese, so the article should be 'a' instead of 'o'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Desativar a IA da {{organizationName}} tornará os modelos fornecidos pela {{organizationName}} indisponíveis.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in Romanian: 'modelele... indisponibile' is incorrect. Since 'modelele' is the subject, the adjective must agree in number. However, the current phrasing 'va face modelele... indisponibile' is grammatically awkward/incorrect in this context; it should be 'va face indisponibile modelele' or 'va face ca modelele... să fie indisponibile'. More critically, 'indisponibile' refers to 'modelele' (plural), but the structure 'va face [object] [adjective]' in Romanian requires careful agreement.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Dezactivarea AI-ului {{organizationName}} va face indisponibile modelele furnizate de {{organizationName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'të papërshtatshëm' means 'unsuitable' or 'inappropriate', whereas the English 'unavailable' means 'not accessible' or 'not available' (të papërdorshëm/të padostępshëm).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Disaktivizimi i AI-s së {{organizationName}} do të bëjë modelët e ofruar nga {{organizationName}} të papërdorshëm.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation is a mix of Serbian Cyrillic and Serbian Latin (code-switching). The phrase 'koje pружи' is in Latin script, whereas the requirement is Serbian Cyrillic.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Искључивање {{organizationName}} AI учиниће моделе које пружи {{organizationName}} неактивним.
